body.title: Graph integrator — co-occurrence edges from indexed content
body.result: FACT_CLOUD co-occurrence graph integration complete: ROOT anchor node + weighted edges by chapter proximity, all 397 tests ✓
body.description:
D230 + G-BIO-REPLAY1. Shared primitive used by both:
- Prospective: called after T-reading-indexer completes for a content_id
- Retrospective: called by quiet-period replay habit (T-bio-replay)

For each pair of FACT_CLOUD nodes from same content_id:
- Same chapter: edge weight += 0.2 (strong proximity)
- Adjacent chapters: edge weight += 0.1
- Distant chapters: edge weight += 0.05
- Cap at 1.0
- Upsert interpretive_edge(src, dst, relation=co_deposited, weight=...)

Also creates a ROOT anchor node per book: BOOK_{content_id_short} with edges to all its FACT_CLOUD nodes. This is the retrieval entry point — "Making Money" resolves to this node, which fans out to all deposited facts.

On completion: queue T-self-test with content_id

T-bio-replay (minion currently building) uses this same primitive.

File: wild_igor/igor/cognition/graph_integrator.py (new)
Inertia: LOW
Size: M
Depends on: T-blob-store, T-reading-indexer
